text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Alas! The situation is grave, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My passion for racing has begun to<n>swell. I fear I
cannot contain it much<n>longer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Lalalaaa! ♪ The Centurial Overlord<n>shall prevail this
day! ♪ That being<n>me, I must do say! ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The power to make all cower—I'll<n>trounce any foe!
♪ That is I! T.M.<n>Opera Ooo! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I let her impulses run free until she<n>elatedly heads
for the track.
